rows.label: qev031502_MSG0001
rows.name:
The beasts will be flooding in soon!
Once you're ready, the war begins!
...Well, can you go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031502_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod and say you can go right away.

rows.label: qev031502_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that you aren't fully prepared yet.

rows.label: qev031502_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm counting on you! Show us the power of a BLADE,
the power even the Growth fears![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031502_MSG0003
rows.name:
Alright then... Let's go!
We'll show them with our power that
we don't need that Cavern woman's strength![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031502_MSG0004
rows.name:
An incredible number of beasts are coming.
Make sure your preparations are solid![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031502_MSG1001
rows.name:
Slovity Pagus, huh...
Not only is she strong, but that fair and square way of fighting...
There aren't many even in the Tree Clan like her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031502_MSG1002
rows.name:
...Wait, no! That's wrong!
There's no way I would ever acknowledge
a Cavern warrior![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031502_MSG1003
rows.name:
Hmph! Someday, with the pride of the Bias on the line,
I'll beat down Slovity and her kind!
This is just a temporary truce for now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031502_MSG0005
rows.name:
The beasts will be here soon,
but a BLADE told me to evacuate from here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031502_MSG0006
rows.name:
I want you to do something about it
so I don't have to evacuate![ST:wait ]
